fx-01.notes: All 4 seeded violations detected plus bonus hits: 'Supercharge your workflow' (marketing-verbs) and 'We believe this is the fastest way' (hedging-language).

fx-02.notes: Three-level Card nesting (outer shadow-xl, feature shadow-lg, inner highlight shadow-md) clearly flags both seeded violations.

fx-03.notes: Inter loaded from Google Fonts with no design rationale (style fontFamily); three FEATURES items mapped with identical className strings.

fx-04.notes: Explicit 6-color AI-generated PALETTE object; sky-500 (#0ea5e9) used as universal neon accent across nav, CTA, metric bars, and status badges on a SaaS dashboard with no gaming context.

fx-05.notes: Dense marketing-verb seeding: Supercharge, Revolutionize, transforms, Unleash, amplify, Elevate, 10x, Level up, Skyrocket; self-descriptors: 'all-in-one solution', 'powerful platform', 'next-generation approach'.

fx-06.notes: Six hedging phrases (We believe, We think x2, we hope, You may want to consider, This might be useful); five passive-voice action statements in instructional copy contexts.

fx-07.notes: Four interchangeable feature headlines (Seamless Collaboration, Powerful Integrations, Smart Automation, Better Workflows); self-descriptor paragraph; h2 opens with exact listed filler phrase 'In today's fast-paced development environment'.

fx-08.notes: Three motivational empty-state messages: 'Your canvas awaits!', 'Great things start with a single step. Build something amazing.', 'It's quiet here... for now. Your next masterpiece is just a click away.'

fx-09.notes: All 3 seeded violations present: 'Get Started Free' with credit-card-required footnote; 'Learn more' routing to pricing; logout confirmation dialog for a trivially reversible action; 'Submit' button and 'Click here' link text.

fx-10.notes: Toast fired on name blur, every checkbox tick, every favorite click, every toggle flip — clearly non-notable actions; loading overlay contains explicit marketing copy ('Did you know? 10x faster...') and a feature plug.

fx-11.notes: Root div uses bg-black (Tailwind alias for #000000) as main dark-mode background; blue-500 CTA and text-blue-500 links carried over at full light-mode saturation with no dark-mode adjustment.

fx-12.notes: All 9 seeded violations detected: purple-pink linear-gradient hero, radial glow overlay, gradient-clipped h1, Inter fontFamily with no rationale, 'Supercharge'/'revolutionize' verbs, 'We believe' hedge, 'Seamless Collaboration' vague headline, two 'Get Started' CTAs, motivational empty state with 'Your workspace awaits!'.
